# Project AI Onboarding Playbook

Use the minimal template to move from L0 Unobserved to L1 Claimed to L2
Evidenced.

Discovery candidates are hints. They are not canonical gates. Project AI should
bind each claim to artifacts, tests, receipts, and review evidence, then ask the
owner/reviewer before treating any gate as canonical.

DEGRADED means add evidence, downgrade the claim, or record debt.
